claims.claim_text: Learning about personal finance can change someone’s life.
Not everyone has the opportunity to learn important financial skills.
Teaching personal finance should be an educational priority for all California students.
AB 1871 would require schools to teach personal finance as part of students' social studies coursework before they graduate high school.
